name: General Consultation
aftercare: Follow recommendations from dentist
Schedule follow-up if advised

name: Teeth Cleaning / Scaling
aftercare: Avoid hard or sticky foods for 24 hours
Use sensitive toothpaste if needed
Repeat every 6 months

name: Tooth Filling (Composite)
aftercare: Avoid chewing on filled side for 2 hours
Avoid extremely hot or cold foods for 24 hours
Maintain good oral hygiene

name: Root Canal Treatment
aftercare: Take prescribed antibiotics and painkillers
Avoid chewing on treated side until crown is placed
Crown placement recommended within 2-4 weeks

name: Tooth Extraction
aftercare: Bite on gauze for 30-45 minutes post-extraction
No smoking or alcohol for 48 hours
Avoid spitting or using straws for 24 hours
Soft diet for 2-3 days

name: Braces / Orthodontic Treatment
aftercare: Wear retainers as prescribed after braces removal
Avoid sticky and hard foods
Maintain thorough oral hygiene around brackets

name: Dental Crown
aftercare: Avoid extremely hard or sticky foods
Temporary crown: no chewing hard items
Maintain good brushing and flossing around crown

name: Teeth Whitening
aftercare: Avoid staining foods and drinks for 48 hours
No smoking for 72 hours post-treatment
Use whitening toothpaste to maintain results

name: Dental Implant
aftercare: Soft diet for 4-6 weeks after implant surgery
No smoking — impairs osseointegration
Regular check-ups every 3 months for first year

name: Gum Treatment (Periodontics)
indications: Chronic bad breath despite good hygiene
aftercare: Use chlorhexidine mouthwash as prescribed
Avoid smoking — worsens gum disease
Follow up every 3 months for first year

name: Wisdom Tooth Removal
indications: Infection around partially erupted wisdom tooth
Cyst or tumour formation around wisdom tooth
aftercare: Ice pack on cheek for 20 minutes on/off for first 24 hours
Take prescribed antibiotics and analgesics
Soft diet for 5-7 days
Rinse with warm salt water from day 2

name: Pediatric Dental Care
indications: Child's first dental visit (recommended by age 1)
aftercare: Establish twice-daily brushing routine
Limit sugary snacks and drinks
Schedule next visit in 6 months
